hero.title: Front-End Developer
hero.description: Specialized in React and TypeScript, creating modern and performant web experiences. Inspired by my father, a software engineer, I transform ideas into elegant code.

about.title: About Me
about.intro1: My journey in technology started early, inspired by my father, an experienced software engineer. Watching him create solutions and solve complex problems made me realize this was what I wanted to do with my life.
about.intro2: I work mainly with front-end, but I have solid knowledge of Node.js. My main stack is React/TypeScript, but I'm always learning new technologies and tools.
about.intro3: I was born in São Paulo (11/23/2005) and currently study in Curitiba, in the 3rd semester of Systems Analysis and Development at Universidade Positivo (UP).

frontend.title: Front-End Specialist
frontend.description: Specialized in React and TypeScript, creating modern and performant interfaces

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Ready
fullstack.description: Knowledge in Node.js for complete application development

cleancode.title: Clean Code
cleancode.description: Passionate about clean, organized, and maintainable code

multilingual.title: Multilingual
multilingual.description: Fluent in English, intermediate in Spanish, global communication

items.description: Born in São Paulo, growing up in a technological environment
Started Full Stack Development courses and dove into the world of programming
Joined UP and started working on real projects with companies
Currently in 3rd semester, seeking new challenges and opportunities

education.title: Academic Background
education.description: Technology course focused on software development, covering programming, databases, software engineering, agile methodologies and project management.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: Practical projects with React, TypeScript and Node.js

experience.title: Experience & Projects
experience.intro: My professional experience includes teamwork, real project development and collaboration with companies in the Curitiba region.

jobs.title: Full-Stack Developer
jobs.description: Contributed to the development of full-stack web applications, working with React, TypeScript and Node.js. Participated in collaborative projects using agile methodologies.

jobs.title: Web Developer
jobs.description: Development of web applications for food management, focusing on intuitive interface and user experience. Implementation of CRUD functionalities and database integration.

cta.title: Let's work together?
cta.description: I'm always open to new challenges and collaboration opportunities on interesting projects.

learning.title: Continuous Learning
learning.description: Technology is always evolving, and so am I. I'm constantly studying new tools, frameworks and best practices to deliver increasingly better solutions.

certifications.title: Courses & Certifications
certifications.intro: I invested in courses and certifications to deepen my knowledge and develop practical skills in full-stack development.

commitment.title: Commitment to Learning
commitment.description: In addition to formal courses, I'm constantly studying through official documentation, tutorials, personal projects and participation in developer communities. Technology evolves fast, and I evolve with it.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's talk?
contact.description: I'm always open to new opportunities, interesting projects and conversations about technology. Get in touch with me!
